name: annotation-backlog-v1
description: Annotation backlog for the 500 additional human-expected cases required to grow regression-v1 from 500 to the M1 target of 1,000 public regression cases.

allowed_input_sources: original synthetic short sentences written for annotation
source_policy.copyright_policy: Do not import copyrighted book/article text into the committed dataset unless license and attribution are clear.

focus: same sentence with two meanings of one source term
